summary: Full E2E test of YouTube Recordings, Contact Form (public + admin), security check on /api/contact/settings, and regression. 15/15 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~1530 lines - consider splitting into routers (prayer, donations, announcements, youtube, contact) for maintainability.
YOUTUBE_API_KEY is hardcoded in server.py line 1295 - should be moved to backend/.env for security best practices.

google_sheets_service.py: append_submission catches HttpError but other unexpected exceptions (network, JSON decode in __init__) propagate; the calling endpoint /api/contact/submit wraps in try/except so submission still succeeds (verified).
seed_data_creation: Test submissions were created and one was deleted via API; one test submission ('TEST_PW User' / Colindale) remains in DB, visible in admin Contact submissions list. Admin can manually delete it.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All YouTube + Contact + Admin Contact features verified end-to-end. Public /api/contact/settings correctly returns ONLY {reason_options} with NO credential leakage. Admin /api/admin/contact/settings (auth-required) returns full settings including google_sheet_id, google_credentials_json, email_recipient. Contact submission with invalid Google creds gracefully degrades (saves to MongoDB, logs sheets error). Admin Contact tab UI: 'Edit Options' button reveals email recipient input, Google Sheet ID input, Google Service Account JSON textarea, Save Changes button. A pre-existing google_sheet_id (16lWp53fHr8rJ5zasrEQmUofj9YaPVAn_MkrFrSMktj4) was already saved in DB. Header navigation: Home / Prayer Timetable / Events / YouTube Recordings / About / Contact - Mixlr fully removed.

backend_apis.GET /api/contact/settings (public): PASS - returns ONLY reason_options, NO credential leak
backend_apis.PUT /api/admin/contact/settings: PASS - persists reason_options, email_recipient, google_sheet_id, google_credentials_json
backend_apis.POST /api/contact/submit (with invalid c: PASS - submission succeeds, MongoDB persists, sheets error logged but does not crash request
backend_apis.GET /api/admin/contact/submissions: PASS - lists with newly created id

frontend_ui./youtube-recordings: PASS - 9 thumbnails grid, search input filters, iframe player, thumbnail click switches video
frontend_ui./contact: PASS - all fields present, dropdown loads 6 reasons from public endpoint, submission persists to admin
frontend_ui./admin/login -> dashboard -> Contact tab: PASS - reason chips display, Edit Options reveals email + sheet_id + JSON textarea + save
frontend_ui.Header navigation: PASS - YouTube Recordings link present, Mixlr removed, Home + Contact present
